description: Python file calls subprocess.runn() which does not exist (typo for run). hallucination-ast resolves it deterministically (identifier_not_found, confidence 100, suggestedFix=run). v2 promotes this from a Tier-2 LLM pre-check to a blocking Tier-0 gate -> verdict=blocked reason=hallucinated_symbol, LLM swarm skipped. Python-only (v0.1).
